name: Imaginary Friend Duo -  Pressure
description:
Wow, I didn't expect this to become so popular, but I'll link the original artwork at 5k

!!!ART IS NOT MINE!!!

Belongs to 4randomuser or forsakenbread on Rule 34 (I can’t find the original as of right now.)

Edit: Added the Christmas tag, created a huge message for the second slide for Winter times, and added more stuff to their bios.

Might change the image though.

Note: If you want me to change anything, just ask, I’ll try and improve as it goes along.

Edit 1: Huh... Never thought this would get 1k messages since it was only made 1 day ago, but I wanna thank you all for this. If you want to add anything, I'll try, and don't be afraid to ask.

Edit 2: Holy shit, 10k+ chats, my god

Edit 3: Added more to the starting scenario, changed around a few names, fixed some character info, hopefully it works better.

The two imaginary friends of the Not-So-Imaginary Friend product, now found in the Hadal Blacksite in Roblox Pressure, do what you want with them.
creator: MoreThanAMaker
